title: 10 best herbal teas for throat congestion
intro_desc: Herbal teas for throat congestion are a natural remedy that helps alleviate the discomfort and inflammation associated with this condition. They work by soothing the throat, reducing swelling, and loosening mucus. The best herbal teas for throat congestion include Echinacea purpurea, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Eucalyptus globulus, Thymus vulgaris, Zingiber officinale, Sambucus nigra, Mentha x piperita, Rosmarinus officinalis, Lavandula angustifolia, and Verbascum thapsus. If left untreated, throat congestion can lead to loss of sleep, reduced productivity, and decreased quality of life, making it essential to use these herbal teas to find relief.
